title: DeathQuitFix
description: A mod that fixes the death screen's quit button by adding code from the pause menu's button
body:
A simple mod that fixes the death screen's quit button by adding code from the pause menu's button. By that I mean the code that increases the _LeaveGame_ stat by 1 and sends a leave packet to the server (if you're in one). This explains why, in the vanilla game, leaving a server using the death screen button causes the player to be locked off (username already logged in) because the server doesn't know that they left.  

> This may only be useful for playing on servers.

As of 1/3/2026, this mod can be replaced by [Mini Multiplayer Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/mppatches) ;)
